messagePrimary: Start with one simple log. You do not need a perfect day to build momentum.
messageAlternatives: The smallest useful action right now: drink water, log one balanced meal, or take a 10-minute walk.

messagePrimary: Protein is behind today. Add a protein anchor to your next meal.
messageAlternatives: Aim for eggs, chicken, fish, beans, lentils, or yoghurt at the next meal.
whyShown: Logged protein under half of target after multiple meals

messagePrimary: Your intake looks very low. Sustainable progress usually beats aggressive restriction.
messageAlternatives: Consider a balanced meal unless a qualified professional advised otherwise.
whyShown: Calories well below target after multiple logs

messagePrimary: Strong consistency today. You are close to your target range.
whyShown: Calories and protein both close to target

messagePrimary: Hydration check — drink and log one glass of water.
messageAlternatives: Hydration supports energy, digestion, and recovery.
whyShown: Logged water under half of target

messagePrimary: Watch the trend, not one day. Short-term jumps are often water, sodium, or training stress.
messageAlternatives: Bodies do not gain fat that fast. This is likely temporary.
whyShown: Today's weight is noticeably higher than previous log

messagePrimary: Your trend is flatter this week. Before changing calories, let's check sleep, stress, sodium, hydration, and consistency.
messageAlternatives: A flat week can still be progress if your waist, steps, or strength are improving.

messagePrimary: Sleep may affect hunger today. Low sleep can increase hunger and reduce recovery.
messageAlternatives: Tonight's win is not perfection — it is protecting your sleep window.

messagePrimary: No problem — want a quick estimate? Your next log matters more than yesterday's gap.
messageAlternatives: Missed logs happen. Just log the next thing.
whyShown: No logs yesterday but some logs this week

messagePrimary: Consistency is building. You logged on at least five days this week. That matters more than perfection.
messageAlternatives: Consistency is the foundation of progress. Keep going.
whyShown: Five or more logging days this week

messagePrimary: Balance the salty days. Add a potassium-rich food at the next meal — beans, spinach, potatoes, or banana.
messageAlternatives: Today looks higher in salty packaged foods. Fresh foods can help balance it out.

messagePrimary: Stress can increase hunger and reduce follow-through. Choose the smallest useful action now: water, one balanced meal, or a 10-minute walk.
messageAlternatives: How you feel matters. Pick one gentle action today.
whyShown: Mood or stress flagged as elevated

messagePrimary: If symptoms are up today, the goal can shift from pushing harder to staying consistent with a lighter option.
messageAlternatives: Adjust without quitting — a lighter session still counts.

messagePrimary: Some medicines can change appetite, fluid balance, glucose, or weight trend. That is a body response, not a failure.
messageAlternatives: We will adapt the plan around your medications.
